description.p: A desktop application for writing and publishing EPUB ebooks from Markdown. Built with GTK3 and Python.

ul.li: Project-based workflow with drag-and-drop reordering of chapters
Live Markdown-to-HTML preview updated as you type
EPUB 2/3 export with embedded images and CSS
Customizable CSS theme system with drop-cap support
Multi-language spell-check with inline language markers
Syntax highlighting for code blocks via Pygments
Import from Markdown files and existing EPUBs
Part grouping with auto-generated part pages
